objective: Document the 2026-07-23 codex-rs pull + realtime/subagent research into a durable OpenCodex devlog unit, then sweep finished plan folders into devlog/_fin based ONLY on live filesystem/git evidence (not prior prose claims).

workPhases.title: Docs-only roadmap + inventory protocol for codex-rs research and _plan sweep

tasks.title: Create numbered unit folder under devlog/_plan

workPhases.title: Write codex-rs pull/realtime/subagent research docs from live sources

tasks.title: Record local clone SHAs/paths and pull evidence
Document realtime contracts with source anchors
Document multi-agent/subagent contracts with source anchors
Document OpenCodex impact matrix from live src anchors

workPhases.title: Classify every _plan entry and root units from live evidence only

tasks.title: Write inventory matrix with ACTIVE/FINISHED/AMBIGUOUS + evidence paths

workPhases.title: Move only FINISHED units into _fin safely

tasks.title: Execute moves without clobber; leave ACTIVE/AMBIGUOUS
Verify final tree with ls/find evidence

criteria.scenario: WP0 docs-only unit has 000_plan and decade docs with exact paths/actions
criteria.expectedEvidence: devlog/_plan/<unit>/000_plan.md plus 010/020/030/040 docs exist with file maps

criteria.scenario: Research docs cite live SHAs and source paths for realtime/subagent/OpenCodex impacts
criteria.expectedEvidence: numbered research docs under unit with clone SHAs and file anchors

criteria.scenario: Every current _plan entry and root nonmeta unit classified with evidence path
criteria.expectedEvidence: inventory matrix doc listing all entries with ACTIVE/FINISHED/AMBIGUOUS
criteria.capturedEvidence: 020_inventory_matrix.md/.json covers 25/25 _plan entries + 4 root units; counts FINISHED10 ACTIVE11 AMBIGUOUS8

criteria.scenario: All FINISHED units relocated under _fin; ACTIVE/AMBIGUOUS remain; no clobber

criteria.capturedEvidence: 030_move_log.md + 040_final_tree.md; 10/10 FINISHED moves OK; remaining_plan=15 includes ACTIVE/AMBIGUOUS + current research unit; fin_total=213
